title: Wall Street Mixed as US-China Trade War Prolongs Market Uncertainty
body: Wall Street seesaws as U.S.-China trade war escalates; gold rises, dollar weakens, and bond yields climb amid investor fears.

title: Indonesia Eyes Global Rice Export Market with Projected 12 Million Ton Surplus
body: The government projects a rice surplus of up to 12 million tons, Indonesia will emerge as a key player in the global rice export market.

title: Indonesian Steel Industry Raises Alarm Over Potential Surge in Chinese Imports
body: Trade Ministry data shows that Indonesia’s overall iron and steel exports surged by 261 percent in 2023, reaching $26.7 billion.

title: Indonesian Market Tumbles 9% at Opening Amid Global Trade Jitters
